questions.question: Paul urges that prayers be made for whom?
options: All people, including kings and those in authority
questions.correct: All people, including kings and those in authority
questions.feedback: Paul urges prayers for all people, including kings and those in high positions.

questions.question: How many mediators does Paul say there are between God and man?
questions.feedback: There is one mediator between God and man — the man Christ Jesus.

questions.question: Paul says God desires all people to be saved and come to knowledge of the truth.
questions.feedback: God desires all people to be saved and come to the knowledge of the truth.

questions.question: Paul wants men to pray in every place, lifting holy _____ without anger or quarreling.
questions.feedback: Paul desires men to pray lifting holy hands without anger or quarreling.

questions.question: Christ Jesus gave himself as a _____ for all.
questions.feedback: Christ Jesus gave himself as a ransom for all people.
